query:
SELECT 
            v.id,
            (e.nom || ' ' || e.prenom) as enseignant,
            m.designation as matiere,
            v.montant_net as net,
            '' as date
         FROM vacations v
         JOIN enseignants e ON v.enseignant_id = e.id
         JOIN matieres m ON v.matiere_id = m.id
         ORDER BY v.id DESC
         LIMIT 10
